docs.title: omni-aws
docs.text: AWS providers for the PlexusOne ecosystem.

docs.title: Packages
docs.text: Package Description Import Path omnillm AWS Bedrock provider for OmniLLM github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnillm omnistorage S3 backend for OmniStorage github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnistorage/backend/s3 omnivault Secrets Manager & Parameter Store for OmniVault github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnivault

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: go get github.com/plexusone/omni-aws

docs.title: OmniLLM (Bedrock)
docs.text:
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnillm"

provider, err := bedrock.New(bedrock.Config{
    Region: "us-east-1",
})

docs.title: OmniStorage (S3)
docs.text:
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnistorage/backend/s3"

backend, err := s3.New(s3.Config{
    Bucket: "my-bucket",
    Region: "us-east-1",
})

docs.title: OmniVault (Secrets Manager)
docs.text:
import aws "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnivault"

provider, err := aws.NewSecretsManager(aws.Config{
    Region: "us-east-1",
})

docs.title: Recent Releases
docs.text: Version Date Highlights v0.8.0 2026-05-03 OmniVault AWS providers (Secrets Manager, Parameter Store) v0.7.0 2026-04-25 Consolidated to single Go module v0.6.0 2026-04-25 Repository reorganized as multi-module AWS provider package v0.5.0 2026-04-12 Migration to omnillm-core v0.4.0 2026-03-16 Organization migration from agentplexus to plexusone v0.3.0 2026-01-04 Streaming, tool calling, bearer token auth v0.2.0 2025-12-27 Core chat completion support v0.1.0 2025-12-21 Initial release

docs.title: Versioning
docs.text:
This project follows Semantic Versioning.

  • v0.7.0+: Unified single-module releases covering all packages (omnillm, omnistorage, omnivault)
  • v0.1.0-v0.6.0: Historical releases primarily for omnillm (Bedrock provider)

docs.title: Full Changelog
docs.text: See CHANGELOG.md for the complete history.

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.1.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2025-12-21

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text: • Initial Release: Basic Bedrock client wrapper for OmniLLM

docs.title: [omnillm] Bedrock Provider
docs.text:
Initial implementation of the OmniLLM provider interface for AWS Bedrock:

import "github.com/agentplexus/omnillm-bedrock"

provider, err := bedrock.New(bedrock.Config{
    Region: "us-east-1",
})

Features:

  • Basic Bedrock client wrapper
  • Provider interface implementation for omnillm
  • AWS credential chain support

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: go get github.com/agentplexus/omnillm-bedrock@v0.1.0

docs.title: What's Next
docs.text:
Planned for future releases:

  • Chat completion support via Converse API
  • Streaming support
  • Tool calling

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.2.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2025-12-27

docs.title: [omnillm] Core Chat Completion Support
docs.text:
Full chat completion support via Bedrock Converse API:

import "github.com/agentplexus/omnillm-bedrock"

provider, err := bedrock.New(bedrock.Config{
    Region: "us-east-1",
})

resp, err := provider.CreateChatCompletion(ctx, &provider.ChatCompletionRequest{
    Model: "anthropic.claude-3-haiku-20240307-v1:0",
    Messages: []provider.Message{
        {Role: provider.RoleSystem, Content: "You are a helpful assistant."},
        {Role: provider.RoleUser, Content: "Hello!"},
    },
    MaxTokens:   1024,
    Temperature: 0.7,
})

fmt.Println(resp.Choices[0].Message.Content)

Features:

  • System message handling
  • Multi-turn conversation support
  • Inference configuration (MaxTokens, Temperature, TopP, Stop)

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: go get github.com/agentplexus/omnillm-bedrock@v0.2.0

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.3.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2026-01-04

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text:
• Streaming Support: Real-time token streaming via Bedrock's ConverseStream API
  • Tool Calling: Full function/tool calling support with streaming tool deltas
  • Bedrock API Keys: Simplified authentication with AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK
  • Comprehensive Testing: 18 unit tests + 8 integration tests

docs.title: [omnillm] Streaming Support
docs.text:
Stream responses token-by-token for responsive UIs:

stream, err := provider.CreateChatCompletionStream(ctx, &provider.ChatCompletionRequest{
    Model: "anthropic.claude-3-haiku-20240307-v1:0",
    Messages: []provider.Message{
        {Role: provider.RoleUser, Content: "Tell me a story"},
    },
})
defer stream.Close()

for {
    chunk, err := stream.Recv()
    if err == io.EOF {
        break
    }
    fmt.Print(chunk.Choices[0].Delta.Content)
}

docs.title: [omnillm] Tool Calling
docs.text:
Define tools and let the model decide when to use them:

resp, err := provider.CreateChatCompletion(ctx, &provider.ChatCompletionRequest{
    Model: "anthropic.claude-3-haiku-20240307-v1:0",
    Messages: []provider.Message{
        {Role: provider.RoleUser, Content: "What's the weather in Seattle?"},
    },
    Tools: []provider.Tool{{
        Type: "function",
        Function: provider.ToolSpec{
            Name:        "get_weather",
            Description: "Get current weather for a location",
            Parameters: map[string]any{
                "type": "object",
                "properties": map[string]any{
                    "location": map[string]any{"type": "string"},
                },
                "required": []string{"location"},
            },
        },
    }},
    ToolChoice: "auto",
})

docs.title: [omnillm] Bedrock API Key Authentication
docs.text:
The simplest way to authenticate - generate a key in the AWS Console:

export AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK="your-bedrock-api-key"

No IAM credentials needed when using API keys.

docs.title: Authentication Priority
docs.text: Priority Source Environment Variable 1 Bedrock API Key AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK 2 IAM Credentials AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY 3+ Standard AWS SDK chain Shared credentials, instance roles, etc.

docs.title: Unit Tests (18 tests)
docs.text: go test -v ./...

docs.title: Integration Tests (8 tests)
docs.text:
export AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK="your-key"
go test -tags=integration -v ./...

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
go get github.com/agentplexus/omnillm-bedrock@v0.3.0

Note: This was the last release under the agentplexus organization. Starting with v0.4.0, the module moved to plexusone.

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.4.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2026-03-16

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text: • Organization Migration: Moved from agentplexus to plexusone

docs.title: [omnillm] Module Path Changed
docs.text:
// Before
import "github.com/agentplexus/omnillm-bedrock"

// After
import "github.com/plexusone/omnillm-bedrock"

Migration:

  1. Update import paths in your Go files
  2. Update go.mod:
go get github.com/plexusone/omnillm-bedrock@v0.4.0

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: go get github.com/plexusone/omnillm-bedrock@v0.4.0

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.5.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2026-04-12

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text: • Migration to omnillm-core: Thin/thick provider architecture support

docs.title: [omnillm] Dependency Update
docs.text:
The omnillm dependency changed from omnillm v0.14.0 to omnillm-core v0.15.0.

This aligns with the omnillm ecosystem's new thin/thick provider architecture where:

  • Thin providers (omnillm-core): Native HTTP implementations using Go stdlib
  • Thick providers (separate packages): Use official SDKs from providers

The Bedrock provider in omni-aws is a thick provider using the official AWS SDK.

docs.title: Dependencies
docs.text: • Replace github.com/plexusone/omnillm with github.com/plexusone/omnillm-core v0.15.0

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: go get github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnillm@v0.5.0

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.6.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2026-04-25

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text:
• Repository Reorganized: Multi-module AWS provider package structure
  • OmniStorage Added: S3 backend for OmniStorage ecosystem

docs.title: [omnillm] Module Path Changed
docs.text:
// Before
import "github.com/plexusone/omnillm-bedrock"

// After
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnillm"

docs.title: [omnistorage] S3 Backend
docs.text:
New S3-compatible storage backend implementing omnistorage.ExtendedBackend:

import "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnistorage/backend/s3"

backend, err := s3.New(s3.Config{
    Bucket: "my-bucket",
    Region: "us-east-1",
})

Features:

  • Support for AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, MinIO, Wasabi, DigitalOcean Spaces
  • Streaming read/write with multipart upload support
  • Server-side copy and move operations
  • Backend registry integration (auto-registers as s3)

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
go get github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnillm@v0.6.0
go get github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnistorage@v0.1.0

Note: This was the last multi-module release. Starting with v0.7.0, the repository uses a single go.mod at the root.

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.7.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2026-04-25

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text:
• Single Go Module: Consolidated to single go.mod at repository root
  • Unified Versioning: All packages (omnillm, omnistorage) share the same version
  • Simplified CI: Single workflow for the entire repository

docs.title: Module Path Consolidation
docs.text:
The nested go.mod files have been removed. The module is now github.com/plexusone/omni-aws.

Note: Import paths remain unchanged:

// These still work
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnillm"
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnistorage/backend/s3"

Migration:

# Update your go.mod
go get github.com/plexusone/omni-aws@v0.7.0

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
• Removed omnillm/go.mod and omnillm/go.sum
  • Removed omnistorage/go.mod and omnistorage/go.sum
  • Consolidated changelogs from per-module to single repository changelog
  • Simplified CI workflows (removed multi-module configuration)

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: go get github.com/plexusone/omni-aws@v0.7.0

docs.title: Previous Releases Consolidated
docs.text:
This release consolidates the following per-module releases:

  • omnillm/v0.6.0: Bedrock adapter with streaming, tool calling, bearer token auth
  • omnistorage/v0.1.0: S3 backend with multipart upload, server-side copy

docs.title: Package Overview
docs.text: Package Description omnillm AWS Bedrock provider for OmniLLM (chat, streaming, tools) omnistorage/backend/s3 S3-compatible backend for OmniStorage

import "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnillm"

provider, err := bedrock.New(bedrock.Config{

resp, err := provider.CreateChatCompletion(ctx, &provider.ChatCompletionRequest{

err = backend.Write(ctx, "path/to/file.txt", reader, size)

docs.title: Release Notes: v0.8.0
docs.text: Release Date: 2026-05-03

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text:
• OmniVault AWS Providers: Consolidated omnivault-aws into omni-aws monorepo
  • AWS Secrets Manager: Full vault implementation with versioning and rotation
  • AWS Parameter Store: Hierarchical parameter management with KMS encryption

docs.title: [omnivault] Module Path Changed
docs.text:
The OmniVault AWS providers have moved from a standalone repository into omni-aws.

Migration:

// Before
import "github.com/plexusone/omnivault-aws"
import "github.com/plexusone/omnivault-aws/secretsmanager"
import "github.com/plexusone/omnivault-aws/parameterstore"

// After
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnivault"
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnivault/secretsmanager"
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnivault/parameterstore"

docs.title: [omnivault] AWS Secrets Manager Provider
docs.text:
Full implementation of vault.Vault and vault.ExtendedVault interfaces:

import aws "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnivault"

provider, err := aws.NewSecretsManager(aws.Config{
    Region: "us-east-1",
})

// Get a secret with JSON field parsing
secret, err := provider.Get(ctx, "prod/database/credentials")
fmt.Println(secret.Value)                  // password
fmt.Println(secret.Fields["username"])     // admin

// Version management
versions, _ := provider.ListVersions(ctx, "my-secret")
oldSecret, _ := provider.GetVersion(ctx, "my-secret", versions[0].ID)

// Rotation
newSecret, _ := provider.Rotate(ctx, "my-secret")

Features:

  • JSON parsing for multi-field secrets
  • Version staging labels (AWSCURRENT, AWSPENDING)
  • Secret rotation triggers
  • Binary secret support
  • Tag management

docs.title: [omnivault] AWS Parameter Store Provider
docs.text:
Full implementation of vault.Vault interface with hierarchical paths:

import aws "github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnivault"

provider, err := aws.NewParameterStore(aws.Config{
    Region: "us-east-1",
})

// Get a parameter
secret, err := provider.Get(ctx, "/myapp/prod/database/password")

// With path prefix namespacing
provider, _ := parameterstore.New(parameterstore.Config{
    Region:     "us-east-1",
    PathPrefix: "/myapp/prod",
})
secret, _ := provider.Get(ctx, "/database/password")  // Resolves to /myapp/prod/database/password

Features:

  • Hierarchical path support (/app/env/key)
  • Path prefix namespacing
  • SecureString encryption with KMS
  • String, StringList, and SecureString types
  • Version history retrieval

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: go get github.com/plexusone/omni-aws@v0.8.0

docs.title: EKS with IRSA
docs.text:
On EKS with IAM Roles for Service Accounts, authentication is automatic:

// No credentials configuration needed
provider, err := aws.NewSecretsManager(aws.Config{
    Region: os.Getenv("AWS_REGION"),
})

docs.title: Provider Comparison
docs.text: Feature Secrets Manager Parameter Store Best For Credentials, API keys Configuration, feature flags Rotation Built-in support Manual only Pricing $0.40/secret/month Free tier: 10K params Size Limit 64 KB 4 KB (standard) Hierarchy Flat names Path-based

docs.title: Dependencies Added
docs.text:
• github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2/service/secretsmanager v1.41.7
  • github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2/service/ssm v1.68.6
  • github.com/plexusone/omnivault v0.3.0

docs.title: Internal
docs.text:
Previous omnivault-aws releases incorporated:

  • v0.1.0 (2025-12-27): Initial release with Secrets Manager and Parameter Store
  • v0.2.0 (2026-03-14): Organization rename from agentplexus to plexusone
